title: Raw Provider Payload Store — Pre-Transformation Hashing

sha_binding.verified_source_note: Last substantive commit after rebase — all implementation + CI gate fixes; only proof files change after this SHA

r_level.reason: Migration lane — append-only table, no existing table modified, no backfill required

adversarial_tests: archiveRawProviderPayload — SHA-256 is pre-transformation (raw HTTP response bytes)
archiveRawProviderPayload — hash changes on payload mutation
ingestOddsApiLeague — archive failure blocks ingestion when fail_closed
ingestOddsApiLeague — archive failure non-terminal when fail_open
ingestOddsApiLeague — hash equals SHA-256(raw HTTP response text)
resolveProviderPayloadArchivePolicy — defaults fail-closed; explicit fail_open env opt-out respected

queries.label: INSERT — row accepted with correct SHA-256
queries.sql: INSERT INTO raw_payloads (provider_key, league, run_id, kind, payload_hash, payload, snapshot_at) VALUES ('odds-api', 'NBA', gen_random_uuid(), 'odds', 'abc123deadbeef0000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000', '{"events":[{"id":"utv2-1084-proof"}]}', NOW()) RETURNING id, provider_key, league, kind, payload_hash, created_at;

queries.label: UPDATE — blocked by immutability trigger
queries.sql: UPDATE raw_payloads SET payload_hash = 'mutated' WHERE provider_key = 'odds-api';
queries.error: raw_payloads rows are immutable — no UPDATE or DELETE allowed (UTV2-1084)

queries.label: DELETE — blocked by immutability trigger
queries.error: raw_payloads rows are immutable — no UPDATE or DELETE allowed (UTV2-1084)

row_counts.note: Row count unchanged after UPDATE/DELETE attempts — append-only invariant enforced

constitutional_claims: Invariant 10 (fail-closed): archive write is DB-primary and throws on failure — no silent skip
Invariant 11 (mechanical enforcement): fail_closed is the default; opt-out requires explicit env var
WS-1.1 substrate: raw payload + SHA-256 hash captured from response.text() before JSON.parse() — immutable market truth anchor
